label: Graph Integrity

deductions.evidence: Slugs: axillary-nerve, elbow-joint, median-nerve, proximal-humerus, radial-nerve, ulnar-nerve, upper-extremity-trauma-anatomy-hub

deductions.suggestedFix: Create missing entities or remove invalid relationship proposals.
